title: 补齐 Secret Scan 覆盖与脱敏完整性

sources.reason: Secret scan scope and redaction behavior.
Tracked, untracked, and truncated-key regression coverage.

riskAssessment.reason: A missed untracked or truncated secret can escape governance evidence.

executionDecision.reason: Existing implementation and focused regression coverage are ready for full verification.

preReviewWarnings: Verify scan input is git tracked plus untracked and truncated key fragments are classified safely.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Secret scanning includes tracked and untracked files while excluding only documented binary formats.
Complete and truncated private-key material is detected with stable classifications and safe output.
Regression tests cover untracked secrets, truncated keys, and false-positive fixture boundaries.
The Work Item passes full verification and is archived and committed.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Secret scanning must not rely only on tracked files or complete PEM blocks because untracked files and truncated fragments are common review-time leak paths.
constraints: Do not expose secret contents in diagnostics.
intent.rationale: Scanning the complete worktree input set and classifying incomplete key material closes reproducible false-negative paths without leaking values.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Truncated private-key fragment is detected and classified.
Approved test fixture exemption remains bounded.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
